name: TypeScript
summary: Microsoft 2012. JavaScript + static types. Compile to JS. Structural typing.

facts.text: structural typing: nếu shape match thì compatible
any: escape hatch, mất type safety
strict mode: noImplicitAny, strictNullChecks — nên bật
tsc compile → JS, không runtime overhead

danger: any type phá vỡ type safety
runtime JS vẫn có JS quirks
